creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to shamaz.mazum from comment #2)
Hi Shamaz,

Yes, I understand. But it's been over two years and nobody seemed interested in including this port. Maybe because audio/clunk is already enough for most people or for other reasons. Also, there is no PR for Vangers, showing there is little interest in the game too.

I understand, value and appreciate the effort of creating a new port. I hope this does not discourage you from contributing in the future.
